summary: While the highly procedural nature of this role perfectly aligns with your preference for protocol-driven work over complex analysis, it fundamentally conflicts with your priorities for wellbeing and sustainability. The severe physical toll and high risk of long-term injury make this position unsustainable, while mandatory night and weekend rotations for new hires undermine your desire for stable personal hours. Ultimately, the extreme physical exhaustion and high burnout risk create an environment where the cognitive fit cannot compensate for the lack of career longevity.
